title: French Tomato Tart
description: A classic French tart filled with a delicious tomato and egg mixture. Perfect for a light dinner or snack.
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the pastry to a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a bowl, whisk together the eggs, tomatoes, paprika, and thyme.
Pour the egg mixture into the pastry shell.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the edges are golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
